reading.title: Reading: A rainy day
reading.passage: Look, it is raining now. The wind is blowing hard, and the sun is shining behind the clouds. I am watching the storm from the window. Some leaves are falling from the tree.

questions.question: What is the writer doing?
questions.explanation: "I am watching the storm from the window."

reading.title: Reading: A changing market
reading.passage: Prices are increasing this month. Fruit prices are growing fast. The shop is improving its service, and it isn't selling old food anymore. The market is expanding every year.

questions.question: The market is expanding every year.
questions.explanation: Câu cuối nêu rõ điều này.
